headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 24 points and the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers rallied for their 13th straight victory, 118-117 over the Charlotte Hornets on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: NBA-leading Cavaliers win 13th straight game, rallying to edge Hornets 118-117

headlines.description: — Immanuel Quickley scored a season-high 34 points and the Toronto Raptors overcame a dominant rebounding effort by Walker Kessler to beat the Utah Jazz 118-109 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Quickley scores season-high 34 points as Raptors overcome Kessler's 25 boards and beat Jazz 118-109

headlines.description: — Ja Morant scored 31 points, including the game’s final seven, and Desmond Bane had 27 points and a career-high 16 rebounds as the Memphis Grizzlies rallied in the fourth quarter to beat the Dallas Mavericks 122-111 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morant's 31 points, Bane's 27 points, 16 rebounds, lead Grizzlies past Mavericks 122-111

headlines.description: — Mike Conley, Naz Reid and Donte DiVincenzo each scored 15 points each and the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the Miami Heat 106-104 on Friday night for their fourth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Conley, Reid and DiVincenzo lead the Timberwolves to 106-104 victory over the Heat

events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Aaron Wiggins scored 30 points, Jaylin Williams had his first career triple-double, and the Western Conference-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Portland Trail Blazers 107-89 on Friday night with MVP candidate Shai Gilgeous-Alexander on the bench.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wiggins, Williams lead Thunder past Blazers 107-89 with Gilgeous-Alexander held out for rest

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 31 points, 21 rebounds and a career-high 22 assists and the Denver Nuggets outlasted the Phoenix Suns 149-141 in overtime Friday night after losing a 21-point lead.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nikola Jokic has 31 points, 22 assists and 21 rebounds in Nuggets' 149-141 OT win over Suns

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Sacramento Kings

headlines.description: — Zach LaVine scored 36 points and the Kings beat the San Antonio Spurs 127-109 on Friday night in De'Aaron Fox's first game as a visitor in Sacramento.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zach LaVine outshines De'Aaron Fox to lead the Kings past the Spurs 127-109

events.name: New York Knicks at LA Clippers

names: NBA G League TV on Tubi

media.shortName: NBA G League TV on Tubi

headlines.description: — James Harden scored 27 points, Kawhi Leonard added 20 and the Los Angeles Clippers held off the New York Knicks 105-95 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Clippers beat Knicks 105-95 to avoid slipping out of West playoff race
